overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a sunlit urban wasteland on the city outskirts. The player navigates past groups of pedestrians, colorful market stalls, and industrial debris while futuristic megastructures tower in the background, transitioning from a dry grassland fringe to a sunlit plaza with a golden statue.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban wasteland fringe with dry grass

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through dry grass and dirt toward a group of people in the distance

entered.detail: tall futuristic glass skyscraper with '07' marking visible on facade
large industrial shipping container with yellow paint and black markings on top
cluster of vibrant makeshift stalls with neon signs and colorful awnings
industrial concrete structure with horizontal red stripes and graffiti
scattered palm trees lining the path through the wasteland
heaps of blue and black garbage bags and scattered debris

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dry urban wasteland with scattered vegetation. The iconic megatower 07 dominates the skyline ahead while colorful market stalls appear in the distance to the left. The camera moves forward through the dirt and grass, approaching a group of pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: open market area near highway overpass

events.description: camera begins turning left to navigate around the crowd of pedestrians

agents.ego_description: turning left and walking past colorful market stalls while navigating through groups of pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person in white shirt with arms outstretched gesturing toward others

entered.detail: large curved concrete overpass structure visible in the distance
tall structure with multiple rotating digital advertisement screens

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left, bringing colorful market stalls into closer view on the left while megatower 07 shifts to the right side of the frame. The elevated highway overpass becomes visible in the distance. The crowd density increases as the camera moves through groups of pedestrians near the market area.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial container yard transitioning to plaza

events.description: camera turns right around the yellow shipping container
strong sun glare appears as camera faces toward the setting sun

agents.ego_description: turning right and walking past the yellow container toward a sunlit plaza with scattered groups of people

notable_agents.action: child in light blue shirt running ahead toward the plaza

entered.detail: tall vertical billboard displaying colorful advertisements
large golden sculptural fountain featuring leaping dolphin figures
derelict cars and trucks scattered along the right side

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right, passing the yellow shipping container which now appears on the left. A large digital billboard and abandoned vehicles become visible on the right. As the camera faces the setting sun, strong glare illuminates the scene and a golden dolphin statue emerges in the distance ahead.

agents.ego_description: approaching the golden statue while observing the scattered groups of people in the sunlit plaza

notable_agents.action: person sitting on concrete bench facing the statue

entered.detail: low red concrete walls and benches arranged around the plaza

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches the golden dolphin statue, which now dominates the center of the frame against the bright sunlight. Concrete seating areas appear in the foreground where people are resting. The camera moves through the sunlit plaza, passing scattered groups of pedestrians and abandoned vehicles, with the large billboard now visible in the left background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dry urban wasteland that gradually opens into a sunlit plaza centered around a golden monument. It begins by moving through dirt and scattered vegetation toward the towering silhouette of megatower 07 and distant market stalls. As the camera turns left, the colorful stalls draw closer and the crowd density increases, shifting the megatower to the right as an elevated highway overpass emerges in the distance. The scene then pivots right, passing a yellow shipping container and abandoned vehicles before the camera faces the setting sun, where a strong glare illuminates the path toward a distant golden dolphin statue. Finally, the camera glides into the bright plaza, passing concrete seating areas and pedestrians to bring the golden statue into full view against the brilliant sunlight.
